abstract_summary: Large language models are becoming deep agents that plan, persist state, and invoke tools, shifting safety failures from unsafe text to unsafe trajectories. We introduce AgentFence, an architecture-centric security evaluation that defines 14 trust-boundary attack classes across planning, memory, retrieval, tool use,...
citation: Agent-Fence: Mapping Security Vulnerabilities Across Deep Research Agents. Sai Puppala, Ismail Hossain, Md Jahangir Alam, Yoonpyo Lee, Jay Yoo, Tanzim Ahad, Syed Bahauddin Alam, Sajedul Talukder. 2026-06-23. https://doi.org/10.1609/aaaiss.v9i1.42945
